props.title: Bound Editable Fields
props.description: Two-way bound editable fields with edit/save/cancel lifecycle via action handlers.
props.technicalDescription:
Spec
CaseContainer → [EditToggle, BoundField(bind: "name"), BoundField(bind: "email")]
State
{} initially; at runtime: editingSection, _snapshot, name, email
Features
• BoundField — two-way binding with inline editing
• EditToggle — edit/save/cancel lifecycle via action handlers
• Action handlers — getState, setState with arbitrary paths
• structuredClone — snapshot-based cancel/revert pattern
